title: Software Update - DFU - Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: DFU blocked with low battery popup when headset or charge case battery is below 5%
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on 'Firmware Update' or 'DFU' option
Observe the app behavior when headset or charge case battery is below 5%
Verify a popup appears with the message: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'
Plug the charge case into a power source
During the update flow, unplug the charge case from power
Check if the device battery is still below 5%
Attempt to continue or restart the firmware update
Verify the update is blocked again and the same popup appears
expected: DFU is blocked when headset or charge case battery is below 5%. A popup displays: "Update currently not available, please try back later". When the charge case is plugged into power, the update proceeds normally. If the device is unplugged during the update flow and battery remains below 5%, the update is blocked again with the same popup.
